name: Ramm Enterprise Bus Svc LLC
recent_news: BBB Accredited A+ since April 2021; appears to be a tax-prep/business-consulting/financial-services firm (Living Wills, IRS claims, bookkeeping, notary, business coaching), not a school-bus operator. Name on directory list appears to be a mismatch.
website: rammenterprise.com (note: appears to be business consulting, not bus service)
fit_notes: NOT A FIT. This entity is a business consulting / tax-prep firm despite the 'Bus Svc' name in the source list; no evidence of school-bus operations. Exclude from Summit tuck-in pipeline; flag as data-quality error in source list.

name: William G Becker & Sons Inc
principals: Michael W. Becker (sons; presumed current operators)
districts_or_customers: Wyoming County, NY area (likely Attica/Sheldon/North Java-area districts)
recent_news: Founder William G. Becker died Nov 5, 2018 at age 81 after operating as a bus contractor for 58 years; business continues at 1509 Perry Rd, North Java under family ownership (sons Brian/Kevin/Michael Becker).
website: No standalone website confirmed (listed as Lacey.Areaconnect.Com directory in source data)
fit_notes: Possible micro tuck-in: small (5 employees) multi-generational NY rural school-bus contractor with high succession signal (founder deceased 2018, sons inherited 58-year-old business). Wyoming County area is far from Summit's NYC/metro hubs; scale likely too small unless bolted to another upstate-NY cluster.

name: Coachmaster Transportation
principals: Ken & Nancy Finch (prior owners of Coachmaster/Executive Fleet, 40 years pre-sale)
districts_or_customers: Broome County NY and within 100-mile radius (largest special-needs / NEMT provider in region per company)
recent_news: ACQUIRED Sept 2020: Serafini Transportation Corp (founded 1969) purchased Coachmaster Transportation (formerly Executive Fleet Inc.) from Ken and Nancy Finch; now operates as Serafini Transportation Corp DBA Coachmaster Transportation.
fit_notes: NOT a standalone tuck-in target; Coachmaster is now a DBA of Serafini Transportation (acquired Sept 2020). However, the COMBINED Serafini/Coachmaster platform itself is an independent, family/founder-led upstate-NY operator (school + NEMT + special-needs + charter) and could be a larger Summit acquisition target in its own right - worth re-scoring as a Serafini entry.

name: Bus R Us Trans
districts_or_customers: Brooklyn / NYC area students, sports teams, churches, summer camps
recent_news: No M&A news. Active small Brooklyn operator with 30+ years of stated experience; provides daily school transport plus camps/sports/church charters; mix of large (40 adult/60 child) and small (20-30 child) buses, both AC and non-AC.
fit_notes: Small NYC-Brooklyn owner-operator (Manuel Otero, 20+ yrs in industry). NYC student-transport market is highly regulated/contract-driven and heavily consolidated (Beacon/NellHughes, Reliant, Pioneer, Logan). At ~4 employees this is sub-scale for Summit; only interesting if it holds NYC DOE OPT contracts or routes that could be folded into a larger NYC tuck-in.

name: Williams Brothers
principals: Phillip Williams (Co-owner/brother per USDOT filing 'David & Phillip Williams')
districts_or_customers: Crawford County PA area (Townville / NW PA rural school districts; likely PENNCREST or Conneaut SD area)
recent_news: No M&A news. Active intrastate PA school-bus contractor (USDOT 1107091) operating 15 school buses + 2 passenger buses with 18 drivers under Williams Brothers Bus Contractor name; brothers David and Phillip Williams own.
website: williams-brothers.com (per source data; not independently confirmed in search)
fit_notes: Plausible micro tuck-in: independent two-brother PA school-bus contractor with ~17-bus fleet and 18 drivers in rural Crawford County. Small but right profile (family-owned, intrastate, school-only, no PE backing). Succession risk depends on ages of David/Phillip Williams - worth a discreet outreach to gauge timing; would need to cluster with other NW PA / western NY routes to justify standalone.
